# AgentCamp

> A 5-week practical program where each participant builds, integrates, and operates an AI agent applied to their professional context. Every session produces a functional deliverable.

By [Frutero](https://frutero.club) · In Spanish · 50 spots · Starts May 11, 2026

## Track Record

- 356 participants in the first edition (virtual, English and Spanish)
- 143 participants in in-person bootcamps (NYC + Denver)
- 100+ agents integrated with payments, social media and custom workflows
- 6 hackathon winners — projects born in AgentCamp

## Program

5 weeks · 10 live sessions · 4–6 hrs/week · 1 deliverable per week · Remote, in Spanish

- Week 1: Foundations — Provision a personal AI agent, learn structured prompt engineering
- Week 2: Architecture — Bootstrap files, memory, context layers, composable skills (OpenClaw)
- Week 3: Integrations & Identity — Connect to real tools (email, calendar, repos), activate persistent agent identity
- Week 4: Workflows & Economics — Multi-step autonomous workflows with payment/charging capabilities
- Week 5: Iteration & Demo Day — Evidence-based evaluation, track record review, public capstone presentation

### Competencies at graduation

Graduates can: design agents with robust architecture, write effective system instructions, integrate agents with existing work tools without code, design autonomous multi-step workflows, configure agent economics, evaluate agent performance with real metrics, and present a complete use case to stakeholders.

Prerequisites: None technical. Professional experience assumed. No coding required.

## What You Build With

AgentCamp runs on production-grade infrastructure: Godínez.AI Studio (agent environment), OpenClaw (agent architecture), LLM providers (intelligence), plus identity, payments, and reputation layers — all part of the Frutero ecosystem.

## Pricing

- Early bird: $300 USD (first 20 spots)
- Regular: $450 USD
- Payment via Stripe (credit or debit card)

## Sponsorship Deck

AgentCamp is seeking infrastructure partners whose technology powers the agents participants build.

### Sponsorship Tiers

- **Founding Partner — $5,000 USD** (2–3 slots, category exclusive): Category exclusivity, powers agent infrastructure, named in curriculum, Demo Day presenting sponsor, co-marketing rights, first refusal for future cohorts
- **Infrastructure Partner — $2,500 USD** (3–5 slots): Named in curriculum, Demo Day access, logo on materials, community access, co-marketing
- **Startup Partner — $1,000 USD** (open slots): Named as supporting partner, Demo Day access, logo on materials, community access
- **Community Partner — No fee** (for communities/DAOs/collectives only): Cross-promotion, co-host sessions, Demo Day invitation

### Key Dates

- Now: Partner commitments confirmed
- April 25: Partner logos and materials finalized
- May 11: Cohort 1 starts
- June 7: Demo Day
- June 17: Godínez.AI public launch

Contact: mel@frutero.club
